product_overview: ENJAZ WEB is an enterprise Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS) for managing radiation measurement sample receptions, certificate issuance (PDF), user management and system settings with secure JWT authentication and role-based access.
core_goals: Secure authentication and token lifecycle (access + refresh) for API clients
Provide CRUD operations for users, sample receptions and certificates with auditability
Issue verifiable PDF certificates tied to sample receptions
Expose system settings and backup export for operational reliability
Ensure APIs enforce RBAC and return clear validation and error responses

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Authenticate users and manage JWT access + refresh tokens for protected API access.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials {username, password} -> Receive 200 with access_token and refresh_token
GET /api/v1/users with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with UserDto[] (access token accepted)
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with valid {token: <expired_access_token>, refreshToken: <valid_refresh_token>} -> Receive 200 with new access_token and refresh_token
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with invalid or revoked refreshToken -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Users Management API
features.description: Create and list system users; mutations require authentication and appropriate role permissions.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin_access_token> and body {username, password, fullName, role} -> Receive 201 with created UserDto
GET /api/v1/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin_access_token> -> Receive 200 with UserDto[] including newly created user
POST /api/v1/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin_access_token> and invalid body (missing username/password) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/v1/users without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Samples API
features.description: Record and retrieve sample receptions (incoming samples) with metadata for downstream certificate issuance.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/samples with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {analysisRequestNumber, sender, samples: [...] } -> Receive 201 with created SampleReception
GET /api/v1/samples with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with SampleReception[] including created reception
POST /api/v1/samples with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid body (missing analysisRequestNumber) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/v1/samples with expired or missing token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Certificates API
features.description: Issue certificates tied to sample receptions and generate PDF output for issued certificates.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/certificates with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {sampleReceptionId, certificateType} -> Receive 201 with Certificate (id included)
GET /api/v1/certificates/{id}/pdf with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> (using id from issued certificate) -> Receive 200 with File content (PDF)
GET /api/v1/certificates/{id}/pdf with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> for non-existent id -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/v1/certificates with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid sampleReceptionId -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Settings API
features.description: Retrieve system configuration and export encrypted/JSON backups for operational and disaster recovery tasks.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/settings/system with Authorization: Bearer <admin_access_token> -> Receive 200 with SystemSettings
GET /api/v1/settings/backup with Authorization: Bearer <admin_access_token> -> Receive 200 with File content (JSON/Encrypted backup)
GET /api/v1/settings/backup with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> lacking backup role/permission -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/settings/system without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User authentication and JWT token generation

endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return JWT tokens
Refresh JWT token using refresh token
